steps.observation:
# logging Configuration
# Generated by setup wizard

[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
name = "logging-project_db"
user = "app_user"
pool_size = 10

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]
level = "INFO"
format = "json"
output = "stdout"

[features]
logging_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
